_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
source_files: Operations for Acquired Arteriovenous Fistual MEDCO.pdf
Operations for Acquired Arteriovenous Fistual PPD_CPD.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: MCh or equivalent (in Cardiothoracic Surgery, Vascular Surgery)
DM/DNB or equivalent in Cardiology or Radiology
clinical_indications: Hemodynamic instability, injury to adjacent tissue, and unsuccessful endovascular repair are all indications for open surgical intervention on a fistula.
In traumatic fistulas, failure of spontaneous regression within two weeks indicates repair.
Hemodialysis fistulas that are no longer functioning, no longer needed, have endured multiple attempts at salvage, or fail to mature should be considered for ligation

preauth.label: Clinical notes with detailed history, indications for the procedure and admission notes
Relevant investigations - Duplex ultrasound scan/Angiography/ CT Angiography (CTA)/ MRA reports

claim.label: Barcode of the implant or the graft if used (optional)

ppd_preauth.q: Are the Clinical notes with detailed history, indications for the procedure and admission notes submitted?
Were the investigations reports Duplex ultrasound scan/Angiography/ CT Angiography (CTA)/ MRA submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed Indoor case papers (ICPs) submitted?
Are the detailed procedure/ operative notes submitted?
Is the barcode of the implant or the graft if used submitted?
Is a detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes do not detail history of trauma or intervention that may cause arteriovenous fistula.
Patient's investigation reports (Duplex ultrasound scan/Angiography/CT Angiography/MRA) are not suggestive of the procedure.
Mandatory clinical notes or investigation reports are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization.
Mandatory Indoor Case Papers, procedure/operative notes, or detailed discharge summary are missing or incomplete at claim submission.
Barcode of the implant or graft is missing at claim submission when an implant or graft was used.

additional_information.special_empanelment: Tertiary Care Facilities with the availability of Cath Lab.
clinical_key_pointers: Arteriovenous fistulas are abnormal connections between arteries and veins.

Acquired arteriovenous fistulas can be either 'traumatic' caused by penetrating trauma, blunt trauma and fractures or ‘iatrogenic' caused as a result of percutaneous intervention or invasive procedures.
surgical_options: Endovascular management includes the use of coils, stent-grafts, covered stents and cyanoacrylate glue for closing the fistula.

Open Surgical Repair can be made via autogenous (usually saphenous vein) grafts, synthetic grafts, venous ligation (diameter dependent), bypass, or complex reconstruction involving one or more of the above.
